title: Blade's Libraries
description: Adds libraries all throughout the Minecraft overworld.
body:
# Welcome to Blade's Libraries!
*formally "Blade's Abandoned Libraries"

This is a relatively simple mod. 

it adds the following:
2 Abandoned Library varients, and an additional complete library. Each filled with Books (and webs)
![The Abandoned Library](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xJ3xDRWq/images/a0dee3e31a9d3a9d2323542089d2cc81b3d99701.png)

## What can be found inside the Libraries?
Each Library contains either 1, or a set of chests.

<details>
<summary>The Possible Loot</summary>

```
"name": "minecraft:writable_book",
"name": "minecraft:paper",
"name": "minecraft:string",
"name": "minecraft:stick",
"name": "minecraft:cobweb",
"name": "minecraft:leather",
"name": "minecraft:book" (enchanted and rare)
"name": "minecraft:book",

```



</details>


# FAQ:
  **Question:** Who created this mod?
  
  **Answer:** Me, SemiBlade, I created this mod. I'm a passionate player who's been building structures in games since the xbox 360 days.

  **Question:** Can I add this mod to a modpack?
  
  **Answer:** This mod is licensed under the ARR (All Rights Reserved) License, which requires explicit consent to distribute the mod inside modpacks or other online sources.

  **Question:** Can I review this mod for my YouTube channel (or other video hosting platforms) or article?
  
  **Answer:** You have permission to review, comment on, and criticize the mod/data pack, as long as proper credit is given and any download links are directed to the original source (for example, here on Modrinth).
  
  **Question:** Can I support the author?
  
  **Answer:** For now, downloading the mod is enough, you are also allowed to promote it as long as any credit is accurately given and you link any downloads to the correct source.

  **Question:** What if I have an Idea or issue?
  
  **Answer:** You can DM me, reply to my posts, or @ me here: https://x.com/SemiBlade


**Not officially affiliated with, sponsored by, or otherwise supported by Minecraft/Mojang/Microsoft.**


## Requirements:
The only required mod is "Fabric API"
https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api
